sql.if: AND (u.nickname LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: FROM pt_member_private_benefit b LEFT JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = b.order_id LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = b.member_id LEFT JOIN pt_product p ON p.id = b.product_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = b.store_id

b.id, b.benefit_no AS benefitNo, b.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, b.member_id AS memberId, u.nickname AS memberName, u.phone AS memberMobile, b.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, b.store_id AS storeId, s.storeName AS storeName, b.total_lessons AS totalLessons, b.used_lessons AS usedLessons, b.frozen_lessons AS frozenLessons, b.remaining_lessons AS remainingLessons, b.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(b.effective_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS effectiveAt, DATE_FORMAT(b.expire_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireAt, DATE_FORMAT(b.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS activeCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS usedUpCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 3 THEN 1 END) AS expiredCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 4 THEN 1 END) AS refundedCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN b.remaining_lessons ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRemainingLessons, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN b.frozen_lessons ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalFrozenLessons
1 = 1

SELECT
WHERE b.id = #{id}
AND b.store_id IN (${storeIds})
LIMIT 1
